# BP-66 positive variant: a package-qualified wrapped sentinel is compared with !=.
lang: go
file: BP-66-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: qualified-sentinel
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"io/fs"
)

func load() error {
	err := fmt.Errorf("load: %w", fs.ErrNotExist)
	if err != fs.ErrNotExist {
		return err
	}
	return nil
}
